title: Modeling Implied Volatility Smiles using Black-Scholes and GARCH
summary: An in-depth look at options pricing theory, root-finding numerical solvers, and GARCH statistical modeling for forecasting volatility clustering.
content: Deep-dive into option Greeks, implied volatility smiles, and building real-time quantitative visualizers using Python FastAPI and Plotly.js...

title: Building Production-Grade ERP Systems with Next.js Server Actions
summary: How to structure type-safe Server Actions with Zod validations, Upstash Redis caching, and QStash worker queues for enterprise workflows.
content: A case study on developing scalable client management and material logging platforms, leveraging Next.js Edge handlers and Supabase telemetry streams...
